title: HOW TO PROTECT THE EBT CARD AND SNAP BENEFITS - 211info
text: SNAP FAQ HOW TO PROTECT THE EBT CARD AND SNAP BENEFITS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF QUESTION-How can I protect my EBT card and the SNAP benefits from electronic theft? Answer: Electronic theft of benefits from Oregon EBT cards is on the rise. Skimming devices are being used to steal the card number and personal identification number (PIN). Benefits stolen electronically will not be replaced. Visit the website to protect the benefits under account services. If the member sees a charge they didn’t make, report it immediately. Cancel the card and call the replacement line. -Freeze your card between uses -Block out-of-state and online purchases -Monitor your EBT account activity Confidential Address (855) 328-6715 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (855) 328-6715 Replacement Card Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - ADDITIONAL BENEFITS OF SNAP LEGAL SERVICES - APPLIED AND HAVE NOT BEEN CONTACTED LEGAL SERVICES - ASSETS LEGAL SERVICES - CAN I APPLY IF I AM SELF-EMPLOYED?
